# ADR-2026-04-01-0099: Duplicate ID — second file

**Status:** Accepted
**Date:** 2026-04-17
**Drivers:** Second file with the colliding `ADR-2026-04-01-0099` prefix. Same H1 ID as the first file, since the bug is exactly that two files claim the same identifier.

## Context

Together with `dup-2604010099-a.md`, drives the DuplicateId detector test.
